name: High Priority Target Changed to Low Priority
notes: This rule triggers when a high priority target decreased in priority value.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Attack Surface Management
when the event matches Priority (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches Priority (custom) is less than or equal to 40
when any of Target ID (custom) are contained in any of High Priority Target - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY High Priority Target Changed to Low Priority on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Attack Surface Management
AND when the event matches Priority (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches Priority (custom) is less than or equal to 40
AND when any of Target ID (custom) are contained in any of High Priority Target - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Remove "Target ID" from Reference Set: "High Priority Target"
